name: open-erp
description: Open ERP is a comprehensive enterprise resource planning (ERP) system designed to streamline and optimize business processes across various departments. It offers a wide range of modules and features that cater to the needs of small, medium, and large enterprises. With Open ERP, businesses can manage their operations efficiently, improve productivity, and enhance overall performance.

scripts.install: npm --prefix open-erp-backend install && npm --prefix open-erp-web install && npm --prefix open-erp-mobile install
